message:
test(cancellation): variant-dispatch Display coverage for 4 enums (20 variant paths)

- ShutdownReason: 6 previously untested variants (GracefulTermination,
  ChildError, CascadingFailure, ResourceExhausted, PolicyViolation,
  ParentShutdown) — only UserRequested + Timeout were covered
- FinalizerAction: 4 untested variants (PersistState, ReleaseResource,
  CancelTimers, Custom) — only FlushChannel + CloseConnection were covered
- FinalizerStatus: all 5 variants (Pending, Running, Completed, Failed,
  Skipped) — zero Display tests existed
- ShutdownCoordinatorError: all 4 testable variants (ScopeNotRegistered,
  ScopeAlreadyRegistered, FinalizerNotFound, InvalidState) — zero Display
  tests existed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
